raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/year>, {$430.00} XX/XX/year>, {$430.00} I am filing this complaint against American Express for their refusal to investigate and dispute unauthorized, illegal surcharges imposed by a merchant ( XXXX XXXX XXXX ), despite evidence of systemic fraud and violations of XXXX XXXX  XXXX XXXX ( XXXX XXXX ). 

The merchant has been systematically adding a 5 % credit card surchargewhich exceeds the legal limit and Amex 's own merchant agreementand a 4.5 % sales tax that is manually added to handwritten notes but hidden as a " Custom Amount '' on the official Square POS transaction. This deceptive practice was designed to prevent the discovery of these illegal fees. 

When I contacted American Express to dispute these charges ( some dating back 9 months ), the representative refused to assist with any transactions older than 60 days. However : This is not a simple billing error ; it is a documented merchant compliance violation and unauthorized transaction amount. 

The merchants use of " Custom Amount '' to hide illegal fees constitutes deceptive conduct, which should toll the discovery period for these disputes. 

By refusing to escalate this to their Merchant Compliance Department or open an investigation into these systemic illegal charges, American Express is failing to protect its cardmembers as required under the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ) and is allowing a merchant to profit from prohibited surcharging practices.
